subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath sent down from the heaven of His bounty the gifts of His knowledge and the banquet of His utterance, and hath summoned all [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی انزل من سماء عطائه نعمه عرفانه و مائده بیانه و دعی الکل
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih], @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
